Santiago Modern Smart Home — Los Jardines

$520,000 · house for sale in Santiago

Typehouse
ListingFor sale
Price$520,000
CitySantiago
Bedrooms4
Bathrooms4
Area480 m²
Lot700 m²

Architecturally striking 4-bedroom contemporary home in the gated enclave of Los Jardines del Norte, Santiago. Dual-volume living spaces, an integrated Crestron smart-home system, a heated lap pool with waterfall, home cinema room, and a rooftop deck with panoramic city views.

Features: Pool, Smart Home, Home Cinema, City View, Gated Community, Rooftop Deck
